example: Today, we shall learn the basics of letter writing.
Now, open your notebook and write a letter.
Everybody, write the letter as homework and bring it tomorrow.
I thought I would write a letter and clarify.

ja: ナンセンス、ばかげたこと

example: I am writing you this letter to ask if I can write a letter to my cousin.
Phones are not allowed in the classroom.
Then write to your aunt, telling her about your new bicycle.
Can I write a letter to my cousin in Tinkletown?
zh: 堂兄弟姊妹，表兄弟姊妹
